raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wahrdbus dsirdeja saplohtija
wiꞥſch fatwas Drehbes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninſch patweh-
leja tam Preesteram Jikijum/un
Aikaman Sawana Dehſam/
un Akboram Mikaja Dehſam/
un tain Skrihweram Sawa-
nam/un Asajam tam Kehnina
Kalpam/un fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Eita/waizajeet to KUN-
GU par mums/mannis deht un
par teem Laudim/un par wiſſu
Juhdu/pahr ſchabs Grahmatas
Wahrdeem/kas atrasta irr. Jo
ta KUNGA Bahrsiba irr leela/
kas prett mums eedeggufi/par
to/ka muhsu Tehwi ſchabs
Grahmatas Wahrdbus ne irr
Klausifschi/ka tee buhtn darrij-
schi pehz wiſſu/kas preeſſch
mums usrakſtihts irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nogahje tas Preeste-
ris Jikijus/un Aikams/un Ak-
bors/un Sawans/un Asajus
pee tahs Praiveetes lldas/Sai-
luma Seewas/ta Dehla Tikwa/
ta Dehla Arasa ta Drehbju.Sar-
ga/un ta dshwoja Jerusaleme
ohtrâ Daltâ/un tee ruñaja ar to.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta fazztja us teem:
Ta fakka tas KUNGS Isra-
eka Deews: Sakajt tam Wihr-
ram/kas juhs pee man fuhtijs irr/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta fakka tas KUNGS:
Rangi/es weddischu Nelaimi
pahr scho Weetu/un pahr wiſſ-
was Eedsihwotajeem/wiffus
Grahmatas Wahrdbus/fo tas
Rehntesch no Juhda irr laſſijs/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Par to/ka tee mann irr
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "atstabjufschi/un zitteein Deetvee
kivehpinaifschi/ka tee mann apka-
tinatu ar wiſſeem faweem Rol-
fu Darbeem/tapehz eedegs man-
na Bahrsiba prett scho Weetu
un ne taps isdschſta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet us to Kehninu u
Juha/kas juhs irr fuhtijs t
KUNGU waizaht/buhs jum-
ta fazzibt: Ta fakka tas KUNG-
Israeta Deews/pahr teen-
Wahrdeem/fo tu effi dsirdejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz ka tawa Sirde ir
mihtsa tappufi/un tu eff
preekſch ta KUNGA pasemmo-
jees/eedſirdedams/fo es pret-
tcho Weetu/un prett winna-
Eedsihwotajeem runnajs efmu
ka teem buhs pohsta/un par La-
stu tapt/un tu effi tawas Dre-
bes saplohtifs/un manna Preek-
tcha randajs/tad es tew arridsan-
efmu paklanifs/fakka tas
KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz raugi/es peekt-
chn tew pee tatveem Tehweein/
un tu tapſi ar Meeru taiwá Kap-
pä peelikts/un tawas Azzis ne-
redsehs to Caunu/fo es pahr feho-
Weetu weddischu.Un tee atsaz-
zija scho Wahrdu tam Kehninam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XXIII. Nodalla.
Josijus eejeff atkaf to ibstenu Deewa Kalpo-
schanu/pehz Deewa Bauzlibu un Wahrdu:1.
Ispohsta wiſſu Elka.Deewibu:4.Un no-
kavi tobß elkadeerwigus Ewehtitasus:20.
Turra tobß Vassa=Ewehtkus:21.Toh-
Kartâ nokauts:29.Un winna Dehls Joa-
kas tobß par Kehninu:30.Kas besdeeewigs-
irr:32.Ua tobß no Maratis Nekus zect-
fakents:33.Un Joakims winna Weetu-
par Kehninu eezeits:34.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
